root_text.sn56.103:1.1: … “Evameva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussā cutā manussesu paccājāyanti; atha kho eteva bahutarā sattā ye manussā cutā tiracchānayoniyā paccājāyanti …pe….

translation_text.sn56.103:0.3: Passing Away as Humans and Reborn as Animals
translation_text.sn56.103:1.1: “… the sentient beings who die as humans and are reborn as humans are few, while those who die as humans and are reborn in the animal realm are many …”
